query: Could you create a 5-day travel plan for 2 people departing from Richmond to visit 2 cities in Texas? The trip is scheduled from March 6th to March 10th, 2022. Our budget is $6,000. We have a particular interest in Chinese and Indian cuisines for our meals.

plan.attraction: Downtown Aquarium; Space Center Houston; Water Wall; Houston Museum of Natural Science; Houston Zoo; The Museum of Fine Arts, Houston; Hermann Park; Houston Arboretum & Nature Center; Bayou Bend Collection and Gardens, Museum of Fine Arts, Houston; Market Square Park; Discovery Green; Smither Park; Children's Museum Houston; Holocaust Museum Houston; Sam Houston Park; Houston Legendary Graffiti Building; Beer Can House; American Statesmanship Park; Pioneer Memorial Obelisk;
plan.lunch: Jalapenos, Houston; Super Bakery, Houston; Sheetla Dhaba, Houston; Royal Mart, Houston; Matchbox, Houston; Earthen Spices, Houston; Chawla's, Houston; Cyber Adda 24, Houston; The BrewMaster - The Mix Fine Dine, Houston; Vinayaka Mylari, Houston; Al Arabian Express, Houston; Pebble Street, Houston; Sultan Food, Houston; KSG, Houston; Zaika, Houston; 34 Park Street Lane, Houston; Sunny Chicken Soup, Houston; Giani, Houston; Bhola Dhaba, Houston; G's Patisserie, Houston; Daawat E Mezbaan, Houston; Khanna's Hot Pizza, Houston; Taj Cafe, Houston; Dana Pani, Houston; Shiv Shakti Dhaba, Houston; Vrinda Vaishno Dhaba, Houston; Tasty Bite, Houston; G's Patisserie, Houston; Daawat E Mezbaan, Houston; Khanna's Hot Pizza, Houston; Taj Cafe, Houston; Dana Pani, Houston; Shiv Shakti Dhaba, Houston; Vrinda Vaishno Dhaba, Houston; Tasty Bite, Houston;
